name: Workflows
description: A visual editor for cockpit workflows, and an engine that runs them: drop triggers, actions and decisions on a canvas, wire them together, configure each step, and press Run. Every run is kept — which step got what, what it produced, how long it took — because "it did not work" is not something you can act on. A step this build cannot execute is passed by with a reason, never counted as a success.
author: Cockpit
